name: patchgate
purpose: Pre-write validation for edits and diffs: does the patch apply cleanly, and does every touched file still parse afterward (compile() for Python, json for JSON, tree-sitter for JS/TS/Java/Kotlin)? Ships an optional PreToolUse hook that denies syntax-breaking Edit/Write calls.
reach_for_me_when: you are about to apply a patch and want to know it lands cleanly BEFORE touching the tree
you generated a diff and need machine confirmation the result still parses
you want broken edits denied automatically at the tool-call boundary

commands.name: check-diff
commands.summary: Validate a unified diff: clean apply + post-image parse checks; exit 1 on failure

commands.name: check-content
commands.summary: Validate proposed file content by extension; exit 1 on failure
